utterances.speaker: Kim
utterances.text: So , we are decided , no on plaid , yes on pink ?

utterances.speaker: Nancy
utterances.text: Absolutely !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I am so on board !

utterances.speaker: Kim
utterances.text: Rachel , did not you just light that ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Yea . But you know what ? I am really , really trying to cut back , you know ? Good luck , Rach .

utterances.speaker: Nancy
utterances.text: I have actually been thinking about quitting lately .

utterances.speaker: Kim
utterances.text: Oh sure , every Sunday night I am telling myself I am quitting but every Monday morning it is like

emotion_cause.span: 7_every Sunday night I am telling myself I am quitting but every Monday morning it is like

utterances.speaker: Nancy
utterances.text: Tell me about it !

emotion_cause.span: 7_every Sunday night I am telling myself I am quitting but every Monday morning it is like

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Well then let just quit ! We will just quit ! Let all quit !

emotion_cause.span: 9_let just quit ! We will just quit ! Let all quit !

utterances.speaker: Kim
utterances.text: It does sound appealing .

utterances.speaker: Nancy
utterances.text: Oh , I never could do it .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh but you could .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: You can .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Absolutely !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: We can help each other out !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: We can get ... what are those ... those patches !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: We could be like the Patch Sisters !

emotion_cause.span: 17_We could be like the Patch Sisters !

utterances.speaker: Kim
utterances.text: Oh you know , we really should quit . Okay , let quit !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Yes ! Great ! Give me those cigs ! Give it ! Give it !

utterances.speaker: Kim
utterances.text: My late husband gave me that lighter . I am not kidding .

emotion_cause.span: 20_My late husband gave me that lighter .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Okay then !

emotion_cause.span: 20_My late husband gave me that lighter . I am not kidding .
